description: Use this API to specify or return the number of processors available for parallel operations. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.1.0. ierr = number_threads(ival) ierr, ival = number_threads()

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Value of the option setting between 1 and the number of processors of the computer. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, 1 by default; else output).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
